nodes.name: CRM: Deal Closed-Lost
nodes.notes: Stand-in for a CRM automation trigger (e.g., HubSpot workflow firing when a deal hits Closed-Lost with reason = timing/budget). Manual here so the demo runs on click.

assignments.name: loss_reason
assignments.value: budget freeze — capex pushed to next FY

nodes.name: Clay: Enrich Account Signals
nodes.notes: Enrichment scaffold. Without a Clay API key this call fails softly (neverError) and the next node injects realistic mock signal data, so the demo always runs green.

values.content: ={{ "Write a reactivation email (under 120 words) from an Atlas Industrial AE to " + $json.contact_name + ", " + $json.contact_title + " at " + $json.company_name + ". Context: deal went cold (" + $json.loss_reason + "). Signal triggering outreach: " + $json.top_signal + ". Atlas Industrial prevents unplanned downtime, closes skills gaps, integrates with existing CMMS. Tone: warm and specific. Reference the signal naturally. End with a soft CTA for a 15-min check-in. Body only, no subject line, no signature block or placeholders like [Your Name] — end with the CTA sentence." }}

options.instructions: You are a GTM automation assistant for Atlas Industrial, a predictive-maintenance company that helps manufacturing facilities prevent unplanned machine downtime. Write like a senior sales rep — direct, credible, not salesy.

parameters.text: ={{ "Watch List Added: " + $json.company_name + " | Score: " + $json.reentry_score + "/100 (below 30 threshold). No strong signals yet. Deal value: $" + $json.deal_value + " | Loss: " + $json.loss_reason }}

parameters.content:
## Embers — Closed-Lost Reactivation Engine
Signal watch -> Score -> Generate email via OpenAI -> Route to rep

**Portfolio demo build.** The seller (Atlas Industrial) and all company/contact data are fictional.

**Credentials to wire on import:**
1. Clay API Key (optional) — Node 3. If unset, Node 4 auto-injects realistic mock enrichment data.
2. OpenAI API Key — Node 6.
3. Slack Bot Token — Nodes 8 and 9 (api.slack.com/apps).
